title: Onece group
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''Onece'' group}}
[[File:Onece_group.png|thumb|right|300px|Onece Group]]

[[File:Onece3-TF.png|thumb|right|300px|The [[Mugaari]] freighter ''Onece 3'' carrying [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] is attacked by a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] piloted by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]].]]
'''''Onece'' group''' was a group of five [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] operated by the [[Mugaari]] in the [[Javin sector/Legends|Javin sector]].

Following the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] one of the freighters, ''[[Onece 3]]'', was recruited as a transport for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] escapees trying to sneak through [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] lines.

However, while passing through the Imperial checkpoint at [[Outpost D-34]], a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]] piloted by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] scanned the vessels for illicit cargo and discovered the hidden Rebels. With the aid of Stele in lowering the freighter's shields, [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] [[Sigma group|''Sigma'']] disabled the offending craft with [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]], then boarded and captured the fugitives despite the arrival of several Alliance [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class shuttles]] to defend the ship.

Once the hostile craft were all either destroyed or driven off, the captured freighter of ''Onece'' group departed into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], bound for an Imperial impound yard.
